occupation: Chief Strategy Officer (CSO) at W Group Holding
summary:
Dynamic and results-driven senior market leader with a proven track record in orchestrating transformative campaigns and achieving unparalleled success in marketing, brand development, communication, and retail for prestigious international luxury brands, including Tiffany & Co. and Porsche.

Renowned for driving strategic initiatives and forging lasting connections across the Middle East, Africa, CIS, Russia, and sub-continent regions, I specialize in leveraging DOOH media and pioneering innovative strategies within W Group Holding.

As a visionary strategist and influential communicator, I am dedicated to surpassing industry benchmarks and nurturing lasting partnerships. My passion, commitment, and relentless pursuit of excellence define my approach to every endeavor.

experiences.title: Chief Strategy Officer (CSO)
experiences.description: With over 30 years of experience in Marketing, Communication, and Brand Strategy, I have built a career that bridges agency leadership with client-side brand stewardship. Since joining W Group Holding, I have focused on elevating the Group’s positioning and optimizing the consumer journey across Hypermedia and DXTA Technology. Now, as Chief Strategy Officer, I drive long-term strategy, innovation, and sustainable growth. Beyond work, I’m a dedicated mother of twin teenage boys, balancing career, fitness, and cheering on their football ambitions.

experiences.title: Chief Marketing Officer
experiences.description:
Re-establish the identity and positioning of the Group and its entities (Hypermedia, DigtiAll and RedPeg ME) in all its Marketing and Communication platforms.
Manage and oversee all strategic Marketing planning and executions for the group. Marketing 
department includes all communication touchpoints related to PR, Media (offline, digital and social), Events and CRM
Plan and develop digital creative content opportunities and implementation
Strategically plan, identify and develop business leads and opportunities to grow the business portfolio
Build strong ‘Creative Hub’ department in Beirut office to support Dubai Head Office
Strategically oversee the ‘Insight and Innovation’ opportunities of the Group

experiences.title: Managing Director
experiences.description:
At RedPeg, we create magic. Experiential marketing, brand engagement, brand experience – these aren’t necessarily new words but there are some subtle nuances and deliverables that go way beyond pure event marketing.

RedPeg is an award-winning independent brand engagement agency that’s been collaborating with some of the U.S.’s biggest brands for 23 years. RedPeg Middle East will launch its presence through its Dubai headquarter on 5 December 2018.

experiences.title: Marketing/PR Director Emerging Markets
experiences.description:
Responsible for the development of the marketing, public relations, event and CRM strategies in the Emerging Markets region covering: Middle East, Turkey, Egypt, East Europe, Central Europe.
A core senior member of the leadership team successfully converting the business structure in the UAE & Russia in 2012& 2014 respectively.
Strategically Plan, manage & develop regional marketing strategies and executions of the Retail (UAE & Russia) and Wholesale business in the region (KSA, Kuwait, Qatar, Bahrain, Oman, Lebanon, Egypt, Turkey, Ukraine, Kazakhstan & Azerbaijan).

experiences.company: Porsche Middle East and Africa FZE
experiences.title: Public Relations Manager
experiences.description: Reported directly to the Managing Director, with responsibility for developing & launching new Press Relation program for the region to support Porsche’s growth strategy and ensure positive and constructive PR coverage were achieved across 16 markets (Levant, GCC, India, Pakistan, & South Africa). Received PR Manager of the Year”award in 2007 for Porsche Worldwide.

experiences.title: Group Manager
experiences.description: Responsible for developing & implementing an independent Public Relations and communication program to support the Jaguar automotive brand across the Middle East & North Africa region. In addition to other brands as: BMW, Coca Cola, Microsoft & DHL.

experiences.title: Guest Relations Manager
experiences.description: Worked and implemented Policies & Procedures of the Hotel to the Intercontinental standards during the pre-opening office period. Successfully organized the Guest Relations department set-up and the Club InterContinental Executive floor. Recruited, organized and designed the Front Office department with Guest Relations team. Responsible for the Six Continent Club.

experiences.title: Duty Manager
experiences.description: Implemented the Policies & Procedures of the hotel to Intercontinental standards during the pre-opening office period. Created the set-up of the Guest Relations and Front teams and implemented Personal Development Plans for all.

experiences.title: Public Relations Coordinator
experiences.description: Part of the Information Center team set-up in organizing and promotion the corporate image launch of the largest real estate project in Lebanon. Assisted in selling shared, organizing exhibitions and tours on Beirut a central District.
experiences.location: Beirut Central District, Beirut Governorate, Lebanon

accomplishment_honors_awards.title: Marketing For Woman Award
accomplishment_honors_awards.description: Successful 360 marketing case study for the launch of a new Collection “Tiffany T”in the region.

accomplishment_honors_awards.title: PR Manage for the Year
accomplishment_honors_awards.description: Best PR manager for the year for a Porsche Worldwide for the successful launch of Porsche Cayenne, Cayman and other regional plans achieved throughout the year.
